title: shadowtheworld
description: Add the "Shadow the World" Stand to Ripples of the Past
body:
## ShadowTheWorld Addon For Ripples of the Past

"The inspiration comes from the Stand 'Shadow the World' featured in JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Heritage for the Future."

### Left-Click Skills
- Light punch
- Heavy punch（shift variation of Light punch/Punch barrage）
- Punch barrage
- Triple Knife Throw
- Ninefold Knife Throw (Shift variation of Triple Knife Throw)
- Knife Encirclement (When used on an enemy, knives form a circle around them before converging inward)

### Right-Click Skills
- Block
- Time Stop
- Teleport During Time Stop (Shift variation of Time Stop)
- Time Stop Counter (Upon activation, enters a 1-minute defensive counter state. If attacked during this period, instantly teleports behind the attacker and delivers a single strike. If the attack is on cooldown, only teleports without attacking)
- Shadow Assault (Instantly dashes forward up to 10 blocks, attacking through obstacles. Inflicts brief Blindness, Nausea, and Slowness debuffs on hit)
- Stun Punch (Stuns players, causing brief knockdown and immobilization. Inflicts Slowness and short-term damage over time to mobs)
- Shadow World Evolution (Can only be used at night. When used with a Nether Star in the off-hand, Shadow World enters a stabilized state, consuming the star to yield a "Page of DIO's Notes". Using the skill with the note in the off-hand triggers a 50-second evolution process into "The World")

### Mechanism Details
Shadow World has two states: Stable and Unstable.
- Initially awakened as Unstable, manifested through constant visual distortion of the stand and automatic retraction after each attack.
- After consuming a Nether Star via Shadow World Evolution to obtain a "Page of DIO's Notes", it enters a Stable state—eliminating visual distortions and preventing automatic retraction after attacks.
-Pages of DIO's Notes also have a 1% chance to generate in world chests. Nine pages can be combined to create DIO's Notes.。
